name: Al Maha, a Luxury Collection Desert Resort & Spa

content.verdict: Al Maha is the desert honeymoon in the UAE and one of the most romantic resorts in the Gulf. Set inside the 225-square-kilometre Dubai Desert Conservation Reserve — a protected habitat where the resort is the only human presence — the property comprises just 42 Bedouin-inspired suites, each with its own private temperature-controlled pool and uninterrupted dune views. Guests are strictly 18+, full-board dining is included, and two daily guided activities (wildlife drives, falconry, camel treks, horse rides, archery) are also included with the rate. The silence at Al Maha is extraordinary: on clear nights the Milky Way is visible with the naked eye, and the Arabian oryx and gazelle herds wander past the deck of your suite at sunrise. Honeymooners looking for a complete contrast to coastal luxury — and one of the world's best desert stays — should book Al Maha.
content.best_room: The Royal Suite is the standout honeymoon category — 1,200 square metres with a separate living pavilion, private dining area, and a larger infinity pool elevated over the dunes. The Emirates Suite and Bedouin Suite are equally atmospheric at a friendlier price point, with the same private-pool-on-the-dunes experience.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Arrival in the Reserve
itinerary_7_nights.description: Ninety-minute transfer from Dubai International crosses the desert highway and enters the Conservation Reserve through a private gate. Welcome at the tented lobby with cardamom coffee and dates, then a buggy to your suite where a private pool and a dune horizon are already waiting. Sunset on your deck with the oryx grazing below.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Dawn Wildlife Drive & Falconry
itinerary_7_nights.description: Sunrise wildlife drive with a resident guide tracking oryx, Arabian gazelle, and sand fox — the best wildlife viewing in the reserve is the first hour of daylight. Return for breakfast, then a morning falconry demonstration with the resident falconer. Afternoon in your private pool as the light softens over the dunes.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Camel Trek & Spa Journey
itinerary_7_nights.description: Camel-trek morning — an hour across the dunes at walking pace with a bedouin handler, ending at a shaded tented breakfast. Afternoon couples' journey at the Timeless Spa using Arabian healing traditions: coffee-scrub, oud-oil massage, and a hammam. Private candlelit dinner on your suite deck.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Horse-Riding & Private Pool
itinerary_7_nights.description: Pre-dawn horse ride across the reserve — Al Maha's Arabian horses are trained for the terrain and the sunrise ride is one of the most atmospheric activities in the UAE. Lazy afternoon and a long swim in your private suite pool.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Archery & Evening Under the Stars
itinerary_7_nights.description: Morning archery and falconry session — both are included in the rate. Sunset sundowner drive with champagne and canapés served on a dune ridge. Later a private dinner at the main Al Diwaan restaurant overlooking the reserve, then an astronomy session with the resident guide reading the constellations in the Bortle-2 desert sky.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Private Dune Breakfast
itinerary_7_nights.description: Private dune breakfast — the resort sets up a linen-covered table on a remote dune with a full breakfast service. One of the most photographed honeymoon moments at Al Maha. Afternoon at the main infinity pool, then a second sunset wildlife drive to see the herds moving toward the waterholes.

itinerary_7_nights.title: Farewell to the Reserve
itinerary_7_nights.description: Final sunrise drive and a slow breakfast in your suite. Check-out at noon with a private transfer back to Dubai. Al Maha is the rare resort that people describe as transformative — the combination of silence, wildlife, and private pool deck creates a honeymoon memory in a distinct register from coastal luxury.

caveats: Al Maha is adults-only (strictly 18+) — couples travelling with family members should note the age policy before booking.
Summer temperatures in the reserve reach 45°C — October to April is the only genuinely comfortable honeymoon window; avoid June–August.
The resort is full-board and the 42 suites mean a small shared dining setup — couples seeking multiple restaurant options and beach access should pair Al Maha with 3–4 nights on the Dubai coast.

faqs.question: Is Al Maha good for honeymooners?
faqs.answer: It is one of the finest honeymoon resorts in the Middle East. Adults-only 18+, all suites with private pools on the dune edge, two guided activities daily included, full board, and unmatched silence inside a protected 225-square-kilometre reserve.

faqs.question: Is it genuinely adults-only?
faqs.answer: Yes — the minimum age is 18 years and the policy is strictly enforced. The property design and activity roster are built around couples and solo travellers seeking silence.

faqs.question: What is included in the rate?
faqs.answer: Full board (breakfast, lunch, dinner), two scheduled activities per day (choice of wildlife drive, falconry, camel trek, horse ride, archery, guided nature walk), non-alcoholic soft drinks, and Wi-Fi are included in the standard rate.

faqs.question: How do we combine Al Maha with Dubai?
faqs.answer: The classic pairing is 3 nights at a Dubai coastal resort followed by 3–4 nights at Al Maha, or the reverse. The 90-minute transfer makes either sequence workable and the contrast between coast and desert is a honeymoon highlight.

faqs.question: What's the best suite for a honeymoon?
faqs.answer: The Royal Suite is the most private option with its own pavilion layout. The Emirates Suite and Bedouin Suite are both excellent at friendlier pricing with the same private-pool-on-the-dunes experience.

faqs.question: How do we get there?
faqs.answer: Fly into Dubai International (DXB) — about 90 minutes by private transfer, which the resort arranges. A second airport option is Al Maktoum (DWC) at 75 minutes.

content.email_template:
Subject: Honeymoon booking inquiry — Al Maha Desert Resort

Dear Al Maha team,

My partner and I are planning our honeymoon and would love to stay with you from [DATE] to [DATE] ([X] nights).

We are particularly interested in: [Bedouin Suite / Emirates Suite / Royal Suite]

Could you please confirm:
- Availability for our dates and any honeymoon package
- Full-board inclusions and which two daily activities can be pre-reserved
- Options for a private dune breakfast and couples' spa journey during the stay

Thank you for your time.

[Your names]
